conflicts.description: CORRECTED (verified against source, direction was reversed in original PR #59): the canonical JSON schema itself uses the ABBREVIATED enum ['LOW','MED','HIGH']. It is the Pydantic model, the CSV persistence model, the runtime calendar-ingestor service, AND the test suite that all independently use the FULL WORD 'MEDIUM'. The schema is the outlier (1 source), not the downstream artifacts (4 independent sources). Recommend reviewing whether contracts/events/CalendarEvent@1.0.json itself should be corrected to 'MEDIUM', rather than normalizing everything else to match the abbreviated 'MED'.

sources.note: impact enum literally ['LOW','MED','HIGH'] -- NOT MEDIUM as originally claimed
_normalize_impact() accepts raw aliases including 'MED' and 'M' and canonicalizes ALL of them to 'MEDIUM' before emission

conflicts.description: 'Desktop_Operator_UI_Response' was a placeholder/umbrella name in the original search task; it does not appear literally anywhere in the repository. conflicts.description: 'MT4_Expiry_Zones_Overlay_Response' was a placeholder/umbrella name in the original search task; it does not appear literally anywhere in the repository. The product purpose text for UI-PRODUCT-MT4-OVERLAY (ui_catalog.json:147-155) is 'Display expiry zones, indicator summaries, spot data, and MT4-facing UI data' -- which the agent correctly decomposed into four separate underivable/source_defined_only contracts: OverlayRender, ExpiryZonesData, IndicatorSummary, and SpotData. None of the four has a schema, model, or test yet; all four require net-new contract authoring. See their own inventory records.

contract.recommendation: Do not author a single contract literally named 'MT4_Expiry_Zones_Overlay_Response'. Author (or request authoring of) JSON schemas for the four decomposed contracts instead.

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: Domain registries with a shared envelope and a central registry index.
decision.rationale: Separates field ownership while preserving a unified graph.

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: JSONL is the authored record format; current JSON snapshots are generated.
decision.rationale: Provides record-level diffs and deterministic whole-registry views.

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.

approval.approval_scope: candidate implementation and branch execution; not registry-by-registry canonical cutover

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: Keep registries as canonical candidates until parity, conflict review, and registry-specific cutover.
options: Candidate shadow system followed by staged cutover

approval.approval_scope: candidate implementation and branch execution; not registry-by-registry canonical cutover

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: Cross-registry links must use stable record IDs; unknown references are queued.
decision.rationale: Enables deterministic validation and graph traversal.

approval.approval_scope: candidate implementation and branch execution; not registry-by-registry canonical cutover

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: Supersede and archive old authorities only after parity confirmation.
options: Mark superseded after parity and archive

approval.approval_scope: candidate implementation and branch execution; not registry-by-registry canonical cutover

decision.compatibility_impact: No authority cutover in this branch.
decision.decision: This branch implements the shared framework, candidate population, graph, reports, generated views, and report-only CI. Authority cutover remains split by registry.
options: Perform all cutovers in one PR
Implement Levels 0-3 and shadow outputs; split Level 4 cutovers
decision.rationale: The governing plan explicitly prohibits a combined cutover before parity and review.

operational_control.fail_criteria: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot
operational_control.rule: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot

operational_control.fail_criteria: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling
operational_control.rule: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling

operational_control.fail_criteria: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle
operational_control.rule: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent
operational_control.rule: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent

operational_control.fail_criteria: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline
operational_control.rule: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline

operational_control.fail_criteria: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event
operational_control.rule: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks
operational_control.rule: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks

operational_control.fail_criteria: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event
operational_control.rule: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged
operational_control.rule: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame
operational_control.rule: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame

operational_control.fail_criteria: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code
operational_control.rule: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code

operational_control.fail_criteria: Reject intent; emit error event
operational_control.rule: Reject intent; emit error event

operational_control.fail_criteria: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason
operational_control.rule: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason

operational_control.fail_criteria: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing
operational_control.rule: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing

operational_control.fail_criteria: If routing fails, emit error and reject
operational_control.rule: If routing fails, emit error and reject

operational_control.fail_criteria: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop
operational_control.rule: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop
operational_control.scope: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter

operational_control.fail_criteria: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy
operational_control.rule: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events
operational_control.rule: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events
operational_control.scope: Normalize broker events to canonical reports

operational_control.fail_criteria: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders
operational_control.rule: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders
operational_control.scope: Apply execution reports to OMS state

operational_control.fail_criteria: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag
operational_control.rule: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag
operational_control.scope: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL

operational_control.fail_criteria: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review
operational_control.rule: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket
operational_control.rule: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket

operational_control.fail_criteria: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision
operational_control.rule: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision

operational_control.fail_criteria: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason
operational_control.rule: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason

operational_control.fail_criteria: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop
operational_control.rule: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop
operational_control.scope: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain

operational_control.fail_criteria: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)
operational_control.rule: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)

operational_control.pass_criteria: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot
operational_control.rule: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot
